title: Start with the Native Control Contract
summary: Build and verify semantic native first in service-status interaction review through prediction, parsed-structure inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain semantic native first from purpose and parsed structure.
Apply semantic native first while retaining prior HTML requirements.
Diagnose the named misconception in a changed content and interaction scenario.

content.text: Native elements provide semantics, focus behavior, keyboard interaction, form participation, states, and platform conventions together. A button is for an action, a link changes location, input controls collect values, progress reports completion, and details discloses optional information. Custom roles recreate only part of those contracts. Apply it to service-status interaction review.
